lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to size the mining suite into the Adder's slots and confirm the ~30 t cargo ceiling.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Adder ship page — manufacturer, hull stats, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint sizes (1M·2S), optional-internal layout (3·3·2·2·1·1·1) and shield/hull figures cited for the mining fit.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Adder shipyard page — hull price, module sellers and refinery/limpet availability for the mining build.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Adder lore, Zorgon Peterson manufacturer and multi-role overview backing the dossier write-up.
